summary: Focana 2.4.4 adds lightweight project context and finishes the Pomodoro wrap-up polish so resuming work feels clearer.
improvements: Start new task now includes a small optional Project field with saved project suggestions and a create-project action when the typed project is new.
Project context is carried through active work, compact mode, resumable sessions, and saved session records.
Pomodoro wrap-up now routes through the notes capture flow with Save and continue later or Mark complete instead of reopening the old Session Wrap menu.
Paused Pomodoro sessions can resume from the paused remaining time, start a fresh Pomodoro, switch to Freeflow, or use a timed session.
Focus insight ledger data is queued locally for future sync without changing the quiet, offline-first session flow.
fixes: Ready to resume now summarizes the accumulated focus time on the current task and offers Keep going, Add break time, or Wrap up.
Pomodoro break and resume surfaces were tightened to avoid nested boxes, stale copy, and awkward extra whitespace in the small desktop window.
